title: notholaena sulphurea
intro: Notholaena sulphurea, also known as the sulphur fern or yellow fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Pteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Notholaena sulphurea include its ability to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antimicrobial agent. Notholaena sulphurea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, and it is also sometimes used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
